title: Zoro and Sanji Enter the Match
description: The final fight becomes a statement of loyalty as Luffy refuses to let Foxy take anyone from him.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this scene focuses on Luffy, Foxy, Nami, Zoro, Sanji. The final fight becomes a statement of loyalty as Luffy refuses to let Foxy take anyone from him.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy is standing back up!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He stood back up! Straw hat Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat Luffy stood back up!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: How is he still standing after that?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Is it be- cause of the wig?

summary: The final fight becomes a statement of loyalty as Luffy refuses to let Foxy take anyone from him.
